chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.281 — Definition

In this subchapter, “port authority” means the Port of Corpus Christi Authority.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 812 (S.B.1571), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2009.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter, “port authority” means the Port of Corpus Christi Authority.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 812 (S.B.1571), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2009.
